app.title: Huatlottery
app.tagline: Singapore 4D & TOTO data + your weekly lucky picks

dashboard.title: Results
dashboard.desc: Today's draws and recent winning numbers.

toto.title: TOTO Stats
toto.recentTrendDesc: What's been hot lately? Click a window to compare different time spans.
toto.monVsThuDesc: TOTO draws happen on Mondays and Thursdays. Do certain numbers favor a specific draw day?
toto.additionalNumberDesc: The extra red ball — often ignored in stats. Here's how it has behaved on its own across 12 years.
toto.yearByYearDesc: The hottest and coldest number for each calendar year since Oct 2014.
toto.sumOf6Desc: Add the 6 winning numbers. Which range is most common?
toto.evenOddDesc: Split of all drawn numbers between even and odd.
toto.bestCombosDesc: The pairs (2 numbers) and triples (3 numbers) that have come out together the most in past draws.
toto.allNumbersDesc: For each number: how many times it has come out, the average gap between appearances, and how many draws ago it last came out. Based on the {count} draws since 9 Oct 2014.
toto.festivalDesc: Look at just one event type. Are there numbers that show up more often in CNY Hongbao draws vs cascade draws vs regular?
toto.specialDrawsDesc: Every TOTO draw outside the regular Mon/Thu schedule — Chinese New Year Hongbao, National Day, year-end specials, and snowball/cascade roll-down draws.
toto.specialDrawsCount: {count} special draws across the full archive — non-Mon/Thu schedule.
toto.tinySample: ⚠ tiny sample — results are noisy, not predictive
toto.noDrawsForCategory: No draws found for this category.
toto.additionalSummary: {count} draws · expected ≈ {avg}× per number if random

fourd.title: 4D Stats
fourd.desc: Top hot numbers, exact and permutation matches.
fourd.top10HotDesc: Ranked by appearances in any prize position (23 per draw). Archive: {from} → {to} · {count} draws.
fourd.repeatWinnersDesc: 4D numbers that have won 1st prize more than once across 40 years.
fourd.dollarSimDesc: If you'd bet $1 Big on a number for every 4D draw, what would your profit be? Big-bet payouts: 1st $2,000 · 2nd $1,000 · 3rd $490 · starter $250 · consolation $60.
fourd.ibetSimDesc: $1 iBet Big = bet on a 4-digit set, win if any permutation hits any prize. Payout divided by unique perms.
fourd.yearlyWinnersDesc: The single most-profitable number each year under $1 Big bet — the number that would have won the most over that year's draws.
fourd.yearlyRegularsDesc: Numbers that hit in the most distinct years (a 4-hit year then 10-year drought counts the year once — eliminates cluster bias). Focus on high year coverage %, low longest drought, and good recent 5/10y coverage.
fourd.calendarBiasDesc: Numbers whose historical prize hits cluster in specific months. Honest warning: with 10,000 numbers × 23 windows tested, ~1,400 false positives are expected even by pure chance. Strong (z≥4) results are interesting but not proven edges — past clusters don't guarantee future hits. Use as curiosity, not strategy.
fourd.digitFreq: Digit Frequency — Single, Double, Triple, Quad
fourd.digitFreqDesc: How often each digit 0–9 appears across all 23 prize positions per draw over the full archive. Single = raw digit %; Double (XX) = digit appearing as a pair (e.g. 1122); Triple (XXX); Quad (XXXX). Expected ≈ 10% / 4.83% / 0.36% / 0.01% each if random.
fourd.anniversaryDesc: Pick any date. See every 4D draw on that month-day across all years.
fourd.repeatWinnersSummary: Out of {unique} unique 1st-prize winners over {total} draws, {repeat} numbers have won 2 or more times.
fourd.pastResultsDisclaimer: Past results — not a prediction. Future draws are independent, the same number won't necessarily keep winning.
fourd.simulatedOver: Simulated over {draws} draws · {sets} iBet sets ranked.
fourd.acrossYears: Across {yrs} years ({from}-{to}): {direct} direct-4D candidates with ≥10 hits; {ibet} iBet sets with ≥20 hits.
fourd.calBiasIntro: {count} numbers cleared z≥2. Sim assumes $1 Big bet ONLY during cluster months (you skip the rest of the year). Watch the "lucky-strike" warning — one $2,000 first prize covers 2,000 bets; if remove-biggest-hit profit turns negative, the apparent edge is a one-off, not a recurring pattern.
fourd.steadyTopByMedianGap: DIRECT 4D · STEADIEST HITTERS — TOP 5 BY LOWEST MEDIAN GAP
fourd.steadyIbetByMedianGap: IBET · STEADIEST HITTERS — TOP 5 BY LOWEST MEDIAN GAP
fourd.gapDistribution: GAP DISTRIBUTION (COUNT OF GAPS IN EACH DRAW-RANGE)
fourd.gapsExplainer: Gap = draws between hits (~156 draws/yr). Median gap = 50th-percentile. Current gap: green ok, amber overdue, red 2× median.
fourd.smallOnlyExplain: Small-only profit = profit counting only starter+consol. iBet divides payouts by # unique permutations (4 distinct digits = 24 perms; doubles = 12 perms etc.).

alpha4d.desc: Quantitative number-selection lab. Filter, backtest, and identify candidates with mathematical edges.
alpha4d.simulatorDesc: Rolling-pool backtest, draw-by-draw, no look-ahead. Configure the filter, click Run. Numbers enter the pool when their gap crosses Gap Low, exit when they hit (gap → 0) or exceed Gap High. Bets placed only on selected month + day-of-week draws. Lifetime tier minimums apply at the moment of qualification.
alpha4d.runHint: Forward-only · no look-ahead. Bet size multiplies all $; Continue keeps a number on the bet list after it hits (may catch 2nd hit on the same #).
alpha4d.simulatorEmpty: Set parameters above and click Run.
alpha4d.buckets: Profitable Buckets — Where Top-3 Wins Came From
alpha4d.bucketsDesc: For every (number, draw) pair within the bet window, bucket by current gap. Counts how many 1st-3rd-prize wins came from each gap bucket. Click a bucket row to expand the winner list with point-in-time lifetime stats.
alpha4d.bucketsEmpty: Click Analyze to scan gap buckets.
alpha4d.heatmap: Robustness Heatmap — Month × Bucket & Day × Bucket
alpha4d.heatmapDesc: For every (number, draw) pair, bucket by gap and group by month/day-of-week. Each cell shows top-3 hit rate vs baseline, with z-score. Helps test if the 2000-2200 signal is stable across slices or fragile to bucket-shift.
alpha4d.currentDry: Currently Dry Numbers — What to Bet Right Now
alpha4d.currentDryDesc: Numbers whose current gap (draws since last hit) falls inside your range. Sorted by gap. These are the numbers a "bet long-dry" strategy would play right now. Click any number to drill into its hit history.
alpha4d.steadyDesc: Numbers with frequent small wins. Theory: regular drips can sustain bets, less reliance on rare big prizes.

form.payoutHint: Big pays $2000/$1000/$500/$250/$60. Small pays $3000/$2000/$800/$0/$0. Combo (3rd column) = both bets placed (cost = Big+Small).

history.title: History Search
history.desc: Search past draws by number or date.
history.numberDeepDiveDesc: Pick any TOTO number (1-49). See first/last appearance, best month, best day-of-week, longest cold streak, and yearly breakdown.
history.additionalPartnersDesc: Pick a TOTO number 1-49. See which main numbers co-appeared when THIS was the additional (the +7th).
history.totoAnniversaryDesc: Pick any date. See every TOTO draw on that month-day across all years.

prediction.title: AI Prediction
prediction.desc: This week's picks, filtered through 40 years of past results.
prediction.notGenerated: No picks ready yet — check back soon.
prediction.weeklyNote: New picks every Monday. These hold until Sunday 23:59.

mynumbers.title: My Numbers
mynumbers.desc: Save your go-to combinations and see how they would have done across 40 years.
mynumbers.noneSaved: Nothing saved yet — add one above.
mynumbers.calendarDesc: Pick any month-day. See every draw on that date across 40 years.
mynumbers.noDrawsFound: No draws found on that date in our archive.

lucky.heading: Your Lucky Numbers
lucky.subheading: Personalised picks + a daily luck reading. Updates every day.
lucky.fourDSubheading: For this week's 4D draws (Wed / Sat / Sun)
lucky.totoSubheading: For this week's TOTO draws (Mon / Thu)
lucky.personalNumberHint: A single number (00–99) just for you, refreshed daily.
lucky.noteMoon: Moon sign approximated using noon SGT — add your birth time for higher accuracy.
lucky.disclaimer: For entertainment only. Lottery outcomes are random; these picks reflect tradition, not probability.

footer.title: Disclaimer & Responsible Play
footer.p1: For education and entertainment purposes only. Huatlottery is an independent, non-commercial project built to explore and visualise publicly available lottery data. Nothing on this website constitutes gambling, betting, financial, or investment advice, and nothing here is a recommendation, tip, prediction, or guarantee of any outcome. All numbers, statistics, trends, "hot/cold" indicators, charts, simulations, and "lucky number" features are provided purely for general interest and amusement.
footer.p2: Lottery draws are games of pure chance. Every draw is random and statistically independent — past results do not influence future draws, and no pattern, system, algorithm, model, or tool (including anything presented on this site) can improve your odds of winning or reliably predict any result. Please do not treat any information here as a way to gain an edge or to "beat" the lottery; mathematically, no such edge exists.
footer.p3: Results are compiled from public sources for reference and may contain errors, omissions, or delays. Always verify against the official Singapore Pools results before relying on any figure. This site is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Singapore Pools or any official lottery operator. Use of this website, and any decisions you make, are entirely at your own discretion and risk; the creators accept no liability for any loss arising from its use.
footer.p4: Gambling is intended for persons of legal age only. If you choose to play, please play responsibly: only ever spend what you can comfortably afford to lose, decide on a budget and time limit in advance, never borrow money to gamble, and never chase your losses. Gambling should be a form of entertainment — never a way to make money, solve financial problems, or cope with stress.
footer.help: Play responsibly — for gambling support in Singapore, call the NCPG helpline on 1800-6-668-668 or visit ncpg.org.sg.
footer.short: For education & entertainment only — not gambling advice.
